reported_entities.name: 台灣積體電路製造股份有限公司 (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company, Limited / TSMC)
reported_entities.claim: 台積電 (2330.TW) is the common abbreviation for 台灣積體電路製造股份有限公司, whose official English name is Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company, Limited (TSMC), the world's largest dedicated semiconductor foundry, headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

reported_entities.name: 台積電 (2330.TW) - Yahoo股市 stock quote page
reported_entities.claim: Confirms 台積電 trades under Taiwan stock ticker 2330.TW, consistent with TSMC identity.

notes: Salva run post scoring-layer fix returned retrieval_health=ok and qualified_count=5 (up from Arm A's context of QualificationScorer returning zero qualified entities per prior audit). Top results correctly and unambiguously identify 台積電 as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company, Limited (TSMC) via the zh-Wikipedia canonical entry and Yahoo stock quote (ticker 2330.TW). No WebSearch needed -- entity resolution was unambiguous from Salva's own output. Other qualified entities were financial/news articles about TSMC (earnings, employee bonuses) rather than distinct companies, so only the two most identity-relevant sources are reported here.
